title: Approval threshold defaults + business-type profiles
description: Default approval thresholds per business-type. RefundApprovalManager reads this catalogue at tenant provisioning to seed the initial refund.approval.threshold_amount_cents + refund.approval.threshold_days_since_payment settings. Tenants may override per-tenant via settings once provisioned.

default_thresholds.note: Default profile. Applies when the tenant's business_type does not match any specific profile below.

profiles_by_business_type.notes: Gyms handle high-volume small-value transactions. Lower amount threshold ($50) + shorter days threshold (14d) reflects the smaller typical purchase size + faster refund expectations.
Sports clubs handle season-based memberships with larger transaction values ($150+ typical). Higher amount threshold matches. Standard 30-day staleness threshold.
Academies typically sell semester-based enrolments ($200+ typical). Higher amount + staleness threshold reflects the longer-term commitment + review timelines.
Multi-facility sports centers. Standard defaults apply.

Schools handle high-value annual tuition + activity fees. Higher amount threshold ($500) + longer staleness threshold (90d) reflects the school-year cadence. Longer SLA (48h) matches slower school administrative pace.
Federations manage multi-club affiliations + tournament fees. Higher amount threshold reflects the pooled-tenant nature of federation-level transactions.

always_require_approval_reasons.description: These reasons force requires_approval=true regardless of amount / staleness thresholds. Sensitive-reason set — requires human-in-the-loop for the audit trail (SOX §404 + regulatory review).

auto_approve_reasons.description: These reasons force requires_approval=false regardless of thresholds. System-initiated path (finance ops caught the duplicate; refund is 100% automated).

customer_allowed_reasons.description: Reasons customer can specify via POST /refunds/mine. Admin-only reasons refused with REFUND_ADMIN_REASON_FROM_CUSTOMER 403 on customer path.
customer_allowed_reasons.note: Tenant may narrow this list via settings.customer_allowed_reasons — but cannot widen it (admin-only reasons stay admin-only).

jurisdictions.notes: Most consumer purchases must be refundable within 14 days. Tenant approval SLA must be well under this window (24h default gives 13-day headroom).
14-day cooling-off period. Refund SLA must give tenants time to process within the window.
Reasonable time refund windows. 14-day baseline is a safe default.
Reasonable time — typically 30 days for change-of-mind refunds.

jurisdictions.regulator: Canadian Consumer Protection Act (varies by province)
jurisdictions.notes: Varies by province — most require 10-day cooling-off for services. Ontario CPO 2002 specifies 10 days.

notes: Tenants can override every threshold via /api/v1/settings/refund at any time — the defaults here seed provisioning only.
Consumer-protection-law baselines are informational for tenants — the module does NOT enforce jurisdiction-specific SLAs (tenants configure their own thresholds).
always_require_approval_reasons cannot be shortened by tenants — those are hard-coded in the module. Tenants may add reasons via config refund.reason.always_require_approval.
auto_approve_reasons cannot be lengthened by tenants — only duplicate_charge auto-approves in v1. Adding more auto-approve reasons is a security review decision.
